items.question: What are your hours?
items.answer: Monday: 11:00 AM to 7:30 PM. Tuesday: 11:00 AM to 7:30 PM. Wednesday: 11:00 AM to 7:30 PM. Thursday: 11:00 AM to 7:30 PM. Friday: 11:00 AM to 7:30 PM. Saturday: 11:00 AM to 7:30 PM. Sunday: Closed.

items.question: Do you deliver?
items.answer: Yes, you can order delivery through Doordash.
